repo.description: The most widely used Python to C compiler
repo.name: cython

body:
It was deprecated on Python 3.14 and removed in Python 3.16.

`inspect.iscoroutinefunction` looks to be available on all versions we care about, so just use that.

It looks like we only need `cyfunction._is_coroutine` on Python 3.9 and some early Python 3.10 builds. After that `inspect.iscoroutinefunction` will correctly identify cyfunctions without any help. Therefore I've disabled it on versions where I believe it's useless.  This isn't strictly necessary to fix the 3.16 test failures though

commit.message:
Fix iscoroutinefunction on Python 3.16

It was deprecated on Python 3.14 and removed in Python 3.16.

`inspect.iscoroutinefunction` looks to be available on all versions
we care about, so just use that.

Add support for _is_coroutine_marker in cyfunction

This is essentially the same as _is_coroutine but with a
different singleton object. Therefore I've shared as much as
the implementation as possible. This makes `inspect.iscoroutinefunction`
work in the absence of `asyncio.coroutine._iscoroutine` which
goes away in Python 3.16. I've defined the fields for the full
overlap though.

Revert "Add support for _is_coroutine_marker in cyfunction"

This reverts commit 23b014bd1089d192f91881de4e4d5a6b8952272d.

title: Fix tests with asyncio.iscoroutinefunction on Python 3.16
